tiles.question: Routing table v2.0 — 21 models calibrated
tiles.answer: Calibrated 15 new models. MiMo-V2.5 and Llama-4-Maverick both score 100%. Groq llama-3.1-8b at 86% with ~50ms latency — fastest model in the fleet. Thinking model extraction fixed (Qwen3.x needs reasoning_content). Routing table now: 6 primary domains, 4 alternatives, 21 total models. F13 Token Budget Principle confirmed again — max_tokens matters for thinking models.
